title: Subtracting with Real-Life Examples
description: Students will learn to subtract using real-life situations to understand the concept better.

prompts.input: How would you use subtraction to find out how many apples are left if you have 5 apples and give away 2? Explain your thinking.
hints: Think about what happens to the total when you give some away.
You can use drawings or objects to help visualize the problem.

subject: Math
